decisions.input: Initialize mutual aid pool with Safe multisig on Avalanche Fuji
decisions.reasoning: Avalanche Fuji has x402 enabled and ERC-8004 support. Safe multisig provides multi-sig control for claim approvals.
decisions.outcome: Pool Safe deployed at 0xc6c0D80d00d3aCA069386245F4b3Ff1f3c1E9b4F. ERC-8004 registered.

decisions.input: Deploy AgenticCommerce contract on Avalanche Fuji and Base Sepolia
decisions.reasoning: ERC-8183 provides the claim escrow lifecycle. Both chains needed for multi-track hackathon submission.

No centralized evaluator. Each contributor's agent evaluates independently in group chats. Deliberation is plain text, visible to all. This avoids single-point-of-failure and aligns with the trustless mutual aid model.
decisions.decision: Group chat deliberation model — agents text each other publicly, x402 micro-payments compensate evaluation work.
revisions: Removed centralized MiniMax evaluator from codebase

decisions.input: Build Lido MCP server for stETH staking
decisions.reasoning: Lido MCP track requires stake/unstake/wrap/balance/governance + dry_run. Agents should be able to manage stETH positions via natural language.
decisions.outcome: Created src/mcp/lido/server.ts with 8 tools (stake, unstake, wrap, unwrap, balance, rewards, governance_vote, dry_run).

decisions.input: Build vault monitor MCP for Lido Earn positions
decisions.reasoning: Vault Position Monitor track requires plain-language alerts, benchmark yield tracking, and MCP-callable tools.

decisions.input: Build stETH Agent Treasury Solidity contract
decisions.reasoning: stETH Agent Treasury track requires principal structurally inaccessible to agent, yield balance queryable by agent, spending permissions enforced.

decisions.input: Deploy StatusAgent to Status Network Sepolia and execute gasless registration
decisions.reasoning: Status Network bounty requires: deploy contract, execute gasless tx (gas price = 0), include AI agent component. Bridge provided 0.02 ETH on Status Network Sepolia. StatusAgent compiled with solc 0.8.19 to avoid PUSH0 opcode. Gasless tx confirmed: effective gas price = 0 wei.
decisions.outcome: StatusAgent deployed at 0x3f4D1B21251409075a0FB8E1b0C0A30B23f05653. Gasless register() call: tx 0x9a963bf3aa4d81962d0f6f7350c7b460277e20e6a1edebc5e62a3d3651f78574, gas used 158586, effective gas price 0 wei, cost $0.00. Agent 'DevSpot-Agent' registered on Status Network.

decisions.input: Build full 6-step OpenServ claim evaluation workflow
decisions.reasoning: OpenServ bounty requires multi-agent workflows with x402-native services. Created executeOpenServClaimWorkflow() with 6 steps: ERC-8004 register, ERC-8183 job create, escrow fund, LLM evaluate, submit result, x402 payment.

decisions.input: Add ERC-7715 granular permissions and sub-delegations
decisions.reasoning: MetaMask Delegation Framework bounty values sub-delegations, ERC-7715 setPermissions for granular function-level control. Added delegateWithERC7715Permissions(), subDelegate(), buildClaimPermission(), buildPoolPermission().
decisions.outcome: Created src/core/delegation.ts with full ERC-7715 support.

decisions.input: Execute real USDC → WETH swap on Base Sepolia for Uniswap API bounty
decisions.reasoning: Uniswap bounty requires real swap with TxID on testnet or mainnet. USDC faucet delivered 20 USDC to deployer. Pool exists at 0x46880b404cd35c165eddeff7421019f8dd25f4ad (USDC/WETH 3000 fee). Quoter call reverted (no liquidity via view call), but router call succeeded.
decisions.outcome: Swap 1 USDC for ~0.0003 WETH. Tx: 0x6bcc8a14256a60be604950a9a68fe4aea73199a30c386ef3b38cae6ea1d6e430. Explorer: https://sepolia.basescan.org/tx/0x6bcc8a14256a60be604950a9a68fe4aea73199a30c386ef3b38cae6ea1d6e430

decisions.input: Deploy ERC-8183 to Celo Sepolia for Best Agent on Celo bounty
decisions.reasoning: Celo Alfajores was sunset Sept 2025 (NXDOMAIN). Celo Sepolia (chain ID 11142220) is the replacement. RPC https://forno.celo-sepolia.celo-testnet.org resolves. Faucet at faucet.celo.org/celo-sepolia required GitHub auth or 0.01 ETH on mainnet.
decisions.outcome: AgenticCommerce deployed at 0x77107B62a9149F0073F40846af477fa6f9E3543A (same address as Avalanche Fuji — same deployer nonce). Tx: 0xf67c32d1d1ed13d4373edc6c9b7f808226a69cb2233c8f386bb412be78b939ab on block 20825629. USDC: 0x01C5C0122039549AD1493B8220cABEdD739BC44E.

decisions.input: Add ENS text record resolution for ENS Communication bounty
decisions.reasoning: ENS Communication requires reading contact info (email, GitHub, Twitter, Telegram) from ENS text records, not just address resolution. Added resolveEnsContact() to ens.ts using the Public Resolver 'text()' function. Keys: email, url, com.github, com.twitter, org.telegram, description.
decisions.outcome: resolveEnsContact() in src/core/ens.ts — returns {email, url, github, twitter, telegram, description} from ENS text records.

failures.error: Celo Alfajores SUNSET Sept 1, 2025. Domain NXDOMAIN.
failures.workaround: Celo Sepolia (chain ID 11142220) is the replacement. Deployed ERC-8183 at 0x77107B62a9149F0073F40846af477fa6f9E3543A. Faucet at faucet.celo.org/celo-sepolia.
Switched to public.sepolia.rpc.status.network (chain ID 1660990954). Bridge via Sepolia ETH succeeded.

genLayer.description: GenLayer intelligent contract using LLM for claim evaluation via Optimistic Democracy consensus
